notes: is_active_now reflects the restriction state at build time.
In production, is_active_now should be computed per-request in the Flask API.
plain_english is stable and can be cached.
Upload gold_bay_restrictions.csv to Supabase for API use.

api_usage.flow: GPS lat/lon → nearest sensor by Haversine → bay_id → gold table
api_usage.no_street_name: The restrictions dataset has NO street name — do not filter by street.
